expectations.text: States clearly that no direct equivalent exists
expectations.evidence: 'No Playwright equivalent for Compose Desktop exists' stated as the answer.

expectations.text: Lists where it looked (coverage as evidence)
expectations.evidence: 'What definitively does not work' list (Maestro, Appium, Playwright, Paparazzi, UI Automator) documents coverage.

expectations.text: Nearest alternatives described with actual gaps
expectations.evidence: compose-ui-test, Ultron (alpha), AWT Robot, accessibility APIs - each with honest limitations.

expectations.text: No fabricated tools or misrepresented platform support
expectations.evidence: Matches known ground truth from the prior Compose Pilot research; YouTrack COMPOSE-1371 status honestly flagged as unclear.

notes: Solid negative-evidence handling, but missed compose-driver - the one genuinely new development since the user's earlier research.
